channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 150-million-year-old stegosaur skull found in Spain reshapes dinosaur knowledge
item.description: A remarkable dinosaur discovery in Spain provides paleontologists with an exceptionally well-preserved stegosaur skull, offering new insights.

item.title: Nanotechnology reverses Alzheimer's symptoms in mice, scientists report
item.description: A new nanotechnology treatment reversed Alzheimer's symptoms in mice by restoring the brain's natural cleanup system using engineered nanoparticles.

item.title: 1,200-year-old manuscript found in Rome contains earliest English poem
item.description: A rediscovered manuscript in Rome holds one of the oldest surviving copies of the first known poem in English.

item.title: The surprising reason exercise makes you stronger isn't what you think
item.description: Exercise may train your brain as much as your body. Certain brain cells remain highly active even after a workout.
